TokenMeter v0.2.0 adds an in-app settings and quit menu, with a responsive login-start toggle backed by the existing LaunchAgent.

## Highlights

- Open **设置与退出…** by clicking it or using standard submenu navigation.
- Toggle **随系统启动** with a persistent `ON` / `OFF` status.
- Quit TokenMeter with the standard `⌘Q` shortcut.
- Keep the menu responsive while LaunchAgent changes run in the background.
- Preserve an explicitly disabled login-start choice across source-installer upgrades.
- Remove the legacy `com.user.tokenmeter` LaunchAgent during migration to prevent duplicate launches.

## Requirements

- macOS 13 Ventura or later.
- `TokenMeter-v0.2.0-macos-universal.zip` contains `arm64` and `x86_64` slices.
- Use `SHA256SUMS` to verify the downloaded archive.

## Signing and Gatekeeper

This release is not signed with an Apple Developer ID and is not notarized by Apple. Gatekeeper may block the first launch. Control-click `TokenMeter.app` in Finder, choose **Open**, and confirm **Open**. Do not disable Gatekeeper globally.

## Privacy

TokenMeter scans supported logs and SQLite databases locally and read-only. It does not upload token usage, prompts, logs, or derived cost data.
